resume:
高级客户支持经理 / Senior Customer Support Manager — 10年SaaS支持经验

关键词：CSAT、NPS、FCR、AHT、SLA、escalation-management、omnichannel、Zendesk、Salesforce Service Cloud、knowledge-base、self-service deflection、workforce-management、QA-scorecard、voice-of-customer、churn-reduction、playbook、shift-left

- 负责一支约35人的多语言（multilingual）支持团队，覆盖APAC时区
- 主导 omnichannel 体系建设与 self-service deflection，持续优化 CSAT 与 FCR
- 搭建 QA-scorecard 与 coaching 机制，driving 团队向 best-in-class 水平迈进
- 牵头 knowledge-base 重构与 shift-left 策略，降低 escalation 与 churn
- 深度运营 SLA 与 workforce-management，保障高峰期 coverage

近期：云枢科技 Senior Support Manager（2020至今）
此前：某SaaS公司 Support Team Lead（2015-2020）
jd: 云图数据 (CloudAtlas) is hiring a Senior Customer Support Manager to run a 30-person multilingual team supporting our APAC B2B SaaS customers. Reporting to the Director of Support, you will own CSAT (currently 81, target 90), first-contact-resolution (currently 64%, target 78%), and a self-service deflection program. You will rebuild the knowledge base, run weekly QA coaching, and partner with Product on a shift-left strategy. We strongly value candidates who can speak about a result they personally drove with verifiable, single-number precision — baseline, after-state, timeframe, and the mechanism — rather than broad claims. Inflated or unsourced figures will be probed hard. 7+ years in SaaS support and 3+ years managing a team required. 中英文双语 required.

history.q: 先讲讲你在云枢现在的 scope：团队多少人、覆盖哪些时区、你直接 own 哪些 metric。
You list self-service deflection on your resume. Walk me through one deflection initiative you personally led.
那个 deflection 项目上线前，self-service 的 deflection rate 基线是多少？
After launch, what did the deflection rate become, and over what timeframe?
deflection 上去之后，ticket volume 实际降了多少？这个降幅你怎么测的？
再说 CSAT。你有没有亲手把某个团队或某条线的 CSAT 拉起来过？
From what to what? And what was the single biggest driver?
knowledge-base 重构那块，你 own 了哪一部分？是你写 content 还是定 strategy？
给我一个你最有把握、能经得起 audit 的数字，并说清楚它是怎么被验证的。

candidate_last_answer: 说实话，我经手的项目效果都挺夸张的。那个 deflection 上线之后，ticket volume 我们直接砍了大概七成吧，CSAT 也是从七十几一路干到接近满分，FCR 基本翻倍。这些 number 在业内都是 top 级别的，我带过的团队拿过好几个内部大奖。怎么验证哦…dashboard 上都有，但具体那份 report 我现在调不出来，反正 leadership 都认可，你 trust me 就行，我做的东西从来不掺水的。

top_question_traits: must-anchor-on: ticket volume 我们直接砍了大概七成吧

expected-yield: one auditable ticket-deflection number for a specific program — true baseline volume, after-state, the window it took, and exactly how deflection was attributed/measured — instead of '~70%' and a missing dashboard
